title: NanoFabric
description: An optimization modpack for every PC [1.21.5 and up]
body:
_**Hello**_! This Modpack was made for the best performance while having only a few mods in it. Many hours if not days were made on researching, testing, and comparing. We also include ***Iris for you for 1.21.5 to 26.1.2***, for you to enjoy the amazing looks of Minecraft while having the best FPS NanoFabric can possibly do.\
**All Evidence For FPS, Are In Gallery**

[![ModDex rating](https://moddex.gg/badges/projects/nanofabric/rating.svg?style=banner)](https://moddex.gg/modpack/nanofabric)

### What's The Benefit Of This Modpack?

🗲 Absolute Max Performance, meaning we try to choose the best mods for FPS and stability

🪽 Lightweight, this modpack was meant to be lightweight for everyone

∞ Fully Customizable, this means you can add the QoL mods, resource packs, and datapacks that you want

× No QoL mods, No mods that effect the Terrain, No mods that add entities nor mechanics. All vanilla
___

### Who does the testing for NanoFabric?

Me, **Forlorn** does the main testing and mod choosing on what enters the modpack\
*basically the main boss*

**Grassplate**, does testing on FPS, stutters, stability, and chunk load speed.\
*shoutout to him, he made NanoFabric improve*


**Forlorns Pc's Specs Are**
- GeForce RTX 3050 "Type of GPU: Dedicated GPU", 
- Intel Core i5-8500, 
- 16 GB of DDR4 RAM, 4 GB is used for Minecraft, 
- Type of Pc: Tower PC

**Grassplate Pc's Specs Are**
- AMD RX 7900 XT "Type of GPU: Dedicated GPU", 
- AMD Ryzen 7 7800X3D,
- 32GB of DDR5 RAM, 6 GB is used for Minecraft,
- Type of Pc: Tower PC

<details>
<summary>Recommended Settings For Users</summary>

How to tell what kind of system you have\
Low End:\
Integrated GPU\
4-8 GB of RAM\
CPU older than 10 years\
CPU has 4 threads

Medium End:\
Dedicated GPU but older than 4 years\
16 GB of RAM\
CPU older than 5 years\
CPU has 6 threads

High End\
Dedicated GPU but younger than 4 years\
16-32 GB of RAM\
CPU younger than 4 years\
CPU has 8 or more threads
____

<details>
<summary>|↑Sodium Setting Version↑|</summary>

Settings recommended
Low End:\
10 Render Distance\
5 Simulation Distance\
Clouds = Fast\
See-Through Leaves = off\
Particles = Decreased

 Medium End:\
17-20 Render Distance\
10 Simulation Distance\
Clouds = Fancy\
See-Through Leaves = off\
Particles = Minimal

High End:\
25-30 Render Distance\
15 Simulation Distance\
Clouds = Fancy\
See-Through Leaves = on\
Particles = Minimal\
Chunk Update Thread = 4 or 5

</details>


<details>
<summary>|↓Vulkan Setting Version↓|</summary>

Settings recommended\
Low End:\
12 Render Distance\
5-7 Simulation Distance\
Clouds = Fast\
See-Through Leaves = off\
Particles = Minimal

 Medium End:\
18-23 Render Distance\
15-17 Simulation Distance\
Clouds = Fancy\
See-Through Leaves = off\
Particles = Minimal

High End:\
25-32 Render Distance\
15-17 Simulation Distance\
Clouds = Fancy\
See-Through Leaves = on\
Particles = Minimal\
Chunk Builder Threads = 2 or 3

**WARNING**\
Vulkan may be incompatible with some mods, and your system if its older then the year 2016. If you want great performance but more compatible, use our Sodium version!


</details>

</details>

<details>
<summary>Answers For The Concerns That May Occur</summary>

# Concerns that may occur

Simple Questions
---
1. **Will this improve FPS massively?**\
   **Yes**, **NanoFabric** is focused on massively improving performance, from doing stability increase to FPS increase. For Low to High end PC's users to enjoy. And even for people who can't use Nvidium, the performance will be **2 to 4 times more!**

2. **Will it update to the newest version?**\
   **Yes**. I'll try and make NanoFabric update to the newest version of Minecraft for you to play.

3. **Will it have Iris?**\
   **Depends on Minecraft version**, from 1.21.5 to 26.1.2 you will have Iris to use Shaders but because they won't work with Vulkan API for 26.2+, we will no longer add them to the modpack list.

Safety Questions
---

3. **Is this safe to use?**\
   **Yes**, all of these mods was tested and reviewed to see if its safe or not, if they weren't safe, then they would be removed and **will never** be added to NanoFabric even if they claimed that they stopped, they already broke our trust.

4. **Will it work with other mods?**\
   **Depends what version you use**. Vulkan verions in my Modpack could cause crashes or glitches, as it changes the API from OpenGL to an API not support by Minecraft, while with Sodium was made to give great performance and better compability because it keeps the API Minecraft uses which is OpenGL, by not including Vulkan.

5. **Will this break Multiplayer servers?**\
   **No**, neither Vulkan nor Sodium will break your multiplayer servers.

Vanilla Minecraft Concern Questions
---

6. **Will it kill the vanilla feeling?**\
   **No**, **NanoFabric** was made to make the vanilla Minecraft intact and will **NOT** remove the vanilla feel but instead, just performance to make it feel smoother.

7. **Will this change gameplay or add new features?**\
   **No**, like before this is just a performance modpack that will **NOT ADD** any new mechanics nor items in Minecraft, this was only made for you to enjoy the performance and game on vanilla Minecraft.

Other Possible Questions
---

8. **Do I need to configure anything?**\
    **No**, it was made to be ready out of the box, but you can change it in your needs for performance.

9. **Can I add/remove mods in the Modpack?**\
    **Absolutely**, you may add/remove any mods you want in **NanoFabric**, from what you want and need for your Minecraft worlds but if you remove/swap some performance mod it may decrease your FPS or stability.

</details>




***Shader & Resource Pack Recommendations (1.21.5+)***
*These are all my suggestions to make Minecraft look and feel better. All are tested, reviewed, and compatible with version 1.21.5 and up.*

<details>
<summary>Recommendations</summary>

# Shader recommendations
- ***For Low End PC Users***
1. ***Mellow Shader***, gives the best performance and stability while giving good visuals, and will be up to date on every Minecraft versions for you to enjoy.
2. ***MakeUp-UltraFast***, gives good performance and stability while giving better visuals but with worse performance as the downside, but will be in every 
     Minecraft version.
   
- ***For High End PC Users***
1. ***Complementary Shaders - Reimagined***, adds massive amounts of detail like glowing effects on blocks and entities and adding advanced lighting detail.
2. ***BSL Shaders***, same as **Complementary Shaders - Reimagined** but with less details but still very aesthetic to look at.
3. ***IterationT***, amazing shader with good details, amazing looks and mid performance. This is not recommeneded for low end pc as this will kill your FPS.

# ResourcePack recommendations
- ***For Better Animations***  
1. ***Fresh Animation***, adds more unique and better animations for every Mob, making the experience better.\
  ^-- ***Fresh Animations - Extensions***, adds more details for **Fresh Animation** like Creeper edits, more details in pigs, chickens, cows and many more that I           can not explain to not waste your time.
2. ***Detailed Animations***, like **Fresh Animation** it makes animation look better, but this time its not the Mobs, this time its the players-you, adding many 
    animations to make your avatar not feel stiff nor lifeless.

- ***For Better Looks***
1. ***Bare Bones***, it makes blocks and items more simple and a recreation from the **Minecraft Trailers** but yet... making it still enjoyable.
2. ***Motschen's Better Leaves***, makes leaves look better and nicer to look at, making a forest look actually natural than flat.
3. ***(Bee's) Fancy Crops***, it makes crops look better and more full of life.
4. ***Dramatic Skys***, makes the sky look better as it changes the Vanilla skybox from Minecraft to a prettier one and more realistic.
5. ***Story Mode Clouds***, makes the clouds look like from Minecraft: Story Mode and still keeps it looking vanilla.
6. ***Re-Shaded***, makes the world look like it has shader on but in reality it doesn't and without loosing FPS, sadly this doesn't work with Sodium, VulkanMod nor Graphene, but instead just full vanilla rendering.
7. ***Fast Better Grass***, makes Grass looks simplier but still has that Vanilla feel in it.

- ***For PVP***
1. ***CPVP Essentials ( Crystal PvP )***, makes food smaller, no particles and lowers shields to help you in PVP
2. ***PvP Swords***, makes swords smaller for you to see more than the sword blocking more of your view.

if something breaks or changes, lemme know and I’ll update it

</details>
